ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  "brand_logo" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo image */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the brand operates internationally */,
  "number_of_products" INTEGER /* Number of products offered by the brand */,
  "logo_thumbnail" TEXT /* URL to a thumbnail version of the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "hair_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hair type the product is suitable for */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "product_url" TEXT /* URL to the product page on the e-commerce platform */,
  "product_volume" TEXT /* Volume of the product */,
  "product_ingredients" TEXT /* List of key ingredients */,
  "product_benefits" TEXT /* List of key benefits */,
  "product_variants" TEXT /* JSON array of product variants */,
  "is_best_seller" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the product is a best seller */,
  "is_new_arrival" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the product is a new arrival */,
  "is_discounted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the product is on sale */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount if applicable */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_hair_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("hair_type_id") REFERENCES hair_types ("hair_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hair_types" (
  "hair_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hair type */,
  "hair_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the hair type */,
  "hair_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the hair type */,
  "is_common" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the hair type is common */,
  "recommended_products" TEXT /* JSON array of product IDs recommended for this hair type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hair_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who rated the product */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating (e.g., 4.5/5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "rating_images" TEXT /* JSON array of URLs to images uploaded with the review */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, moderator) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* User's preferred language */,
  "currency_preference" TEXT /* User's preferred currency */,
  "is_subscribed_to_newsletter" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who viewed the product */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was viewed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to view the product */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_views_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being purchased */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who purchased the product */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was purchased */,
  "purchase_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the product was purchased */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the product was shipped */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping used */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_purchases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended product */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score of the recommendation (e.g., 0.85) */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "is_clicked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user clicked on the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
